title: Docs + init idempotency + end-to-end integration
description:
FIRST: 'git merge main --no-edit'; verify all triggers + verify helper merged.

Finalize:
- Update references/activation.md (move post-commit, PreCompact, SessionEnd, SessionStart chat catch-up from 'designed/not-wired' to 'wired'; document the delta/surfaced-cursor and that staleness is announced once), references/intake.md (chat catch-up now auto-triggered; the trigger table), SKILL.md (the activation section + kb verify).
- Confirm cmd_init installs ALL hooks idempotently and they coexist: SessionStart, UserPromptSubmit(comments), PreCompact, SessionEnd in .claude/settings.json + .git/hooks/post-commit; double-init produces no duplicates anywhere.
- End-to-end smoke covering: delta staleness (announce once), post-commit nudge, the chat-trigger hooks present + emitting, kb verify clearing a page.

Test:
- fresh temp repo: double 'kb.py init' → 1 each of SessionStart/UserPromptSubmit/PreCompact/SessionEnd; 1 post-commit git hook.
- docs reference the now-wired triggers.
- py_compile passes.
notes: 2026-06-15 07:45 - [human] ONBOARDING DOCS: add a 'New collaborator' section (SKILL.md + repo-wiki/INDEX.md) — what's inherited on clone (repo-wiki/, scripts, .claude/settings.json hooks) vs local-only (git post-commit hook, .ingest/.comments state); the one-time Claude-Code hook-approval prompt is expected; either run 'kb.py init' once or just open a session (SessionStart self-heals). State plainly that fully zero-touch isn't possible (git-hook + trust-prompt are hard constraints); 'one approval then automatic' is the target.
acceptance_criteria: all hooks install idempotently + coexist (double-init clean); activation.md/intake.md/SKILL.md updated to reflect wired triggers + delta surfacing; end-to-end smoke green
closed_reason: Completed: activation.md/intake.md/SKILL.md updated to wired triggers + delta-cursor + self-heal; new-collaborator onboarding (SKILL.md + INDEX.root); init idempotency confirmed (4 Claude hooks + post-commit, double-init clean); e2e smoke green (delta/post-commit/self-heal/verify, cross-trigger dedup confirmed).
